summary: Comprehensive testing of TabPilot Chrome Extension UI overhaul completed successfully. All major UI changes verified: sidebar moved to LEFT, clean tab styling without grip handles, heatmap functionality, memory/CPU stats, and all existing features remain functional.

minor_issues.issue: Minor DOM detachment during rapid context menu interactions
minor_issues.impact: Context menu functionality works correctly, just timeout on closing

passed_tests: Backend sessions CRUD operations (GET, POST, DELETE /api/sessions)
Sidebar positioned on LEFT side (x=0, width=400px)
Clean tab items without grip handles confirmed
Active tab cyan left accent bar styling
Heatmap panel opens via flame icon (data-testid='action-heatmap')
Heatmap shows Top Domains with 6 heat entries
Heatmap shows Most Visited Tabs with 8 entries
Heatmap Suggested Workflow with 'Save as Session Template' button
Stats bar shows memory usage (2.5 GB) and CPU percentage (4.5%)
All 7 quick action buttons present: new-tab, new-window, close-dupes, mute-all, save-session, group-domain, heatmap
Settings panel opens and back navigation works
Right-click context menu with 10 menu items
Tab close buttons appear on hover
Close duplicates, mute all, new tab/window actions
success_percentage: backend: 100% (5/5), frontend: 95% (minor context menu timeout only)
